warnings: One of 3 distinct views on sheet A-14; siblings are _view1_fixture_symbol_schedule.json and _view2_counter_detail.json.

This 'มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์' (fixture installation-height reference) elevation strip runs across the full bottom width of the sheet -- values are IDENTICAL to sister houses' equivalent strip, cross-confirming the reading.

M. (mirror) and FD. (floor drain) fixtures appear in the symbol legend (view1) but are not shown in this particular height-strip row set, same omission pattern as sister houses' equivalent sheet (mirror height set relative to the LAV below it; floor drains are floor-level by definition).
